messages.text: A bone-shaking bellow rattles your nerve; your hands shake and your swings go wide with fright.
{name} flinches and cowers, badly shaken by a terrifying bellow.
The dread of the bellow fades and your nerve steadies.
{name} shakes off their fright and steadies their guard.
{name} looks frightened and unsteady, their aim fouled by fear.
